name_en: [Chip Version] Model: M43986 VANITY Bag. Inspired by the historic LV Cannes vanity case. Artistic Director Nicolas Ghesquière reimagines the charm of a classic with this semi-rigid bag. Small size. Monogram and Monogram Reverse coated canvas mix. Distinctive Louis Vuitton design. Very elegant. Features a top handle and detachable leather shoulder strap. Multiple carrying options. Size 15x17x15cm
